subject: BLOCKER: WS1.4 type re-review must-fixes
body:
Coordinator directive from Luminous Threading Asteroid.

Re-review status: Ramanujan/assumptions CLEAN/GO; Rawls/test CLEAN/GO; Hubble/type found two must-fix blockers before commit:

1. processor.ts JsonLdRuntime erases jsonld call signatures/options to unknown. Type the internal runtime/options against library-native jsonld types or typeof jsonld.expand/compact/frame, and use satisfies for the no-remote documentLoader options so TypeScript proves the option shape.

2. remote-context.ts scanner widens typed JsonLdDocument/JsonLdContext values back to Readonly<Record<PropertyKey, unknown>>. Type the scanner over JsonLdValue/JsonLdObject and remove the Record<PropertyKey, unknown> helper path so traversal remains compiler-bound to the adapter contract.

Please fix under the active claim, rerun graph-core test/type-check/lint/build plus git diff --check, then report readiness. No staging/commit until type re-review is CLEAN/GO.
